orchestrator_authority: The orchestrator owns strategy, sequencing, fanout, budget, and creative reframing.

specialist_roles.Explorer: freeze target, rank routes, audit theorem preconditions, authorize Generator or Lovasz
specialist_roles.Lovasz: attack actual barriers, maintain proof-DAG/SOC memory, return reviewed products
specialist_roles.Generator: build/repair WIT and Lean artifacts, report checks and receipts without truth arbitration

open_obligations.why: Write exact target, definitions, quantifiers, and target hash.
Convert accepted result into exact Generator blueprint before WIT.
Rank artifact and repair options before artifact work or final report.
Create WIT from strict handoff or record a concrete blocker.
Score Lean/WIT feasibility and missing dependencies before claiming readiness.

next_step.reason: Write exact target, definitions, quantifiers, and target hash.

workflow_gates: route open barriers through Lovasz before Generator
Explorer reviews Lovasz products before Generator
